CustomField.description: Calculated by Customizable Rollups. Do not edit manually. The sum of Amounts for won Opportunities closed in the previous year related to this Account. Uses the Won Opportunities for Hard Credit filter group. Fiscal vs. calendar year is configured in Household Settings.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The total gift amount last year for won Opportunities related to this Account.
CustomField.label: Total Gifts Last Year
